Site.title: Diwan — Where spaces take shape
Site.description: AI-powered turnkey interior fit-out for Saudi Arabia. Three personalized photorealistic 3D design concepts within 72 hours; full installation in 30 days.

Hero.lede: Take a 12-question taste quiz. Diwan returns three photorealistic design concepts in 72 hours, sourced from a vetted Saudi supplier network, delivered turnkey under one accountability.

metrics.m1Label: From quiz to three design concepts

Pillars.title: Four pillars.
Pillars.lede: Every screen, every API, every line of the platform exists to serve one of these four. If a feature does not advance one of them, we do not build it.
Pillars.p1Body: Three credible, costed, photorealistic concepts for your actual space — within seventy-two hours, not weeks.
Pillars.p2Body: Walk through your future home in 3D and AR before a single piece of furniture moves. Swap items in real time.
Pillars.p3Body: Every supplier and contractor receives a complete, unambiguous brief. No back-and-forth. No rework.
Pillars.p4Body: One phone number for the whole project. One warranty across the entire fit-out. Diwan furnished your home — not eight separate suppliers.

Partners.title: Partnered with the developers shaping Saudi Arabia's homes

CTA.title: Twelve questions. Seventy-two hours. Three designs.
CTA.lede: A photo of your room. A few minutes of your taste. The rest is ours.

hero.title: We design and execute the homes of the Kingdom — under one signature.
hero.lede: Diwan was built in Riyadh for the Kingdom's particular cadence: a young population moving into 1.5 million new homes in a decade, who deserve interiors that honor where they are from and look like where they are going. We do this with software, suppliers, and a single accountability — so the customer signs once and lives in the result thirty days later.

story.title: From a single problem worth solving.
story.p1: In 2025, the Saudi housing market produced more units than the country had ever seen in one year. The interiors industry did not produce more designers, more vetted suppliers, or more capacity to project-manage at that scale. Customers received keys to empty boxes and faced six months of WhatsApp threads, eight separate showroom visits, and three contractors with overlapping promises.
story.p2: Diwan exists because the design and the execution of that interior are one decision — not eight. The customer's relationship is with us. The eight suppliers' relationship is also with us. We carry the difference.
story.p3: Our AI design engine is not a gimmick. It is the only way to give a customer who has never read a floor plan three credible, costed, photorealistic options for their actual space inside seventy-two hours — and to give the supplier network downstream a clean, sequenced production brief on the same day.

items.b: One contract. One phone number. One warranty across the entire fit-out — not eight separate aftercare numbers from eight suppliers.
Najdi geometry, Hijazi airiness, contemporary Saudi minimalism — the design language is shaped by where we are, not pasted from elsewhere.
Walk-in conversion in furniture retail is 1.5%. Diwan-routed conversion is 100%. Our suppliers earn more, with less customer service load, predictably.
Murabaha and Ijarah financing co-developed with a licensed Islamic bank and reviewed by an independent Sharia advisor.
Seventy-two hours from quiz to designs. Thirty days from approval to keys-in-hand. The alternative is six months and eleven WhatsApp threads.
Anyone can build a beautiful render. Very few can render, source, sequence, install, and warrant — at one signature.

team.title: Operators, designers, technologists.
team.lede: Built by a small team in Riyadh. Backed by founders, advisors, and a network of suppliers who have shaped Saudi homes for thirty years.

members.bio: Operator background in KSA real estate and turnkey delivery.

members.bio: Twenty years of regional residential interior design across Riyadh and Jeddah.

members.bio: ML engineer with experience shipping production AI products at scale.

members.name: Supply Lead
members.bio: Two decades of supplier relationships across the Saudi furniture and finishes market.

team.placeholderNote: Names and identifying details intentionally blurred for the pre-seed pitch.

hero.title: Six steps. Thirty days. One signature.
hero.lede: From the moment you take the quiz to the moment you receive the keys, every step is operated by Diwan. The customer signs once, at deposit, and again at handover.

items.b: Twelve visual questions about how you live, what you love, and how you receive guests. Answers map to a taste vector that will shape every recommendation.
Upload photos and rough dimensions of every room. We support floor-plan sketches, AutoCAD, and lidar scans from your phone.
Three photorealistic, costed, room-by-room concepts. View in 3D in your browser. Walk through them in AR on your phone. Swap items in real time.
Choose one design. Pay 40% via card, mada, or Tamara/Tabby. Sharia-compliant Murabaha financing available for projects above SAR 100,000.
We dispatch purchase orders to the supplier network the same day. A Diwan project manager owns sequencing, QC, and the install schedule on your behalf.
We hand over the finished space, walk you through every item, and start the warranty clock. One number to call for any issue across the next twelve months.

items.l: From completed quiz to three designs ready to review.
Of orders matched to vetted suppliers with QC at delivery.
From signed deposit to keys-in-hand handover.
Unified warranty across the entire fit-out, with one number.

items.a: Projects start at SAR 60,000 for a small apartment fit-out and scale by space, finishes, and furniture density. The quote at the design stage is itemized — you see what you are paying for.

items.q: Can I customize after I see the designs?
items.a: Yes. Every item in every concept is swappable. Substitute a sofa, change a fabric, choose a different rug — quotes recompute live and the production brief updates automatically.
We offer Murabaha financing, structured with a licensed Saudi Islamic bank and reviewed by an independent Sharia advisor. Larger projects qualify for Ijarah.

items.q: What if something is damaged on delivery?
items.a: We perform a Diwan QC inspection at delivery, before the customer is involved. Issues are routed back to the supplier and replaced before install. The customer never argues with a supplier.
Riyadh is our launch market. Jeddah and Dammam are on the 2026 expansion plan, in partnership with channel developer customers.

hero.title: Pre-qualified leads, on-time payment, none of the showroom traffic.
hero.lede: If you produce furniture, finishes, or fittings in the Kingdom, Diwan is the channel that delivers paying customers without the cost of acquiring them. You build, ship, and get paid. We carry the customer relationship and the warranty.

economics.title: Why suppliers in our network earn more.
economics.lede: A side-by-side of what walk-in retail looks like in Riyadh furniture today, versus what a Diwan-routed order looks like.

rows.diwan: 50% on PO acceptance, 50% on QC sign-off
Quarterly committed volume from top tier

items.b: Every order Diwan sends is a paying order. The customer has already signed and paid forty percent at the deposit stage.
Diwan owns the customer relationship. You receive a clean PO with exact SKU, quantity, finish, delivery address, and timing.
Top-tier partners commit to quarterly volume in exchange for agreed pricing — you can plan tooling, materials, and labor around it.
Our partnerships with ROSHN, NHC, KAFD, and Saudi Downtown Co. funnel buyers into Diwan that no individual supplier could acquire alone.
Featured in case studies, on the marketing site, and in Diwan's social channels — meaningful brand-equity transfer for mid-tier suppliers.
Fifty percent on PO acceptance, fifty percent after our QC team signs off at delivery. Predictable, contractual, no chasing.

circumvention.title: We protect the network we build.
circumvention.p1: Suppliers in the Diwan network sign a non-circumvention clause: if a Diwan-introduced customer purchases directly from the supplier within eighteen months of the introduction, the supplier owes Diwan the missed margin. Enforced through audit rights and reconciliation, this is what allows Diwan to invest in lead generation, designer time, and the QC layer that protects the supplier's reputation as much as the customer's home.
circumvention.p2: In return, Diwan provides volume guarantees, predictable cash flow, and a customer-service buffer. The clause is unenforceable in spirit if either side is treated unfairly, so we run quarterly reviews and adjust pricing transparently.

apply.title: If you produce in the Kingdom, we want to hear from you.
apply.lede: We are actively onboarding furniture, lighting, soft furnishings, kitchen and bathroom finishes, and fit-out contractors. Initial review takes one week.

intro.title: Twelve questions about how you live.
intro.lede: Most take five minutes. Pick the option that feels closest — there is no right answer. You can stop anytime; we resume where you left off.

complete.title: Your taste profile is ready.
complete.lede: We've captured how you live, what you favor, and what your space must accommodate. Next, share a photo of the space and we'll return three concepts within seventy-two hours.

q1.title: Which living room feels more like home?
q1.subtitle: We'll use this to anchor your style baseline.

optionA.label: Formal majlis
tags: A clear room of its own

q6.title: Pick the bedroom you'd actually sleep in.

q9.title: What's your investment range for the fit-out?
q9.subtitle: Rough is fine. We can refine after we see the space.

q10.title: When do you want to be moved in?
q10.subtitle: Sliding scale, in weeks from today.

q11.title: Which of these must your home accommodate?
q11.subtitle: Pick all that apply — these become non-negotiables.

q12.title: How vocal is your color story?
q12.subtitle: Honest answers produce better designs.

header.title: Show us where you live.
header.lede: Three steps. Five minutes if you have a floor plan; thirty if you'd like our surveyor to come measure it for free.

step1.title: How precise are your measurements?
step1.subtitle: All three options lead to the same outcome — pick what's easiest.

diy.title: I'll provide my own
diy.body: You enter dimensions. Designs start immediately.

visit.title: Schedule a free measurement visit
visit.body: A Diwan surveyor visits with LiDAR and tools. Two-centimetre accuracy. Designs start the same day as the visit.

later.title: Upload my plan, I'll measure later
later.body: Saves your work. Designs queue up; we begin when measurements arrive.

step2.title: Pick a floor plan or upload yours.
step2.subtitle: Sample plans are KSA-typical — you can re-tag every room in the next step.
step2.uploadPrompt: Drop a PNG, PDF, or DWG here, or click to choose
step2.uploadNote: For the demo, uploads are previewed; in production we extract dimensions automatically.

step3.title: Tag every room.
step3.subtitle: Click a room to change what it is. Adjust dimensions if you have them.
step3.selectRoom: Click a room on the plan to edit it

step4.title: Inspirations.
step4.subtitle: Optional. Pick boards we've curated, paste Pinterest links, or upload reference images.
step4.boardsPrompt: Tap any board to add it to your brief. The taste vector adjusts in real time.
step4.pinterestPrompt: Paste up to ten Pinterest pin URLs.
step4.uploadPrompt: Drop reference images here, or click to choose. Up to ten files.

visitModal.title: Schedule a free measurement visit
visitModal.lede: A Diwan surveyor will arrive with LiDAR and a laser measure. About forty-five minutes on site.
visitModal.confirmedBody: A Diwan surveyor will call to confirm within four hours. Designs begin the same day as your visit.

hero.title: One brand. N locations. One signature.
hero.lede: If you operate cafes, clinics, salons, dental practices, co-working, retail, or hospitality — Diwan turns your brand guidelines into coordinated fit-outs across every location, on schedule, on brand.

compare.title: B2C is taste. B2B is brand.
compare.subtitle: We separate the two pipelines for a reason. Businesses don't have moods of the day; they have brand books.

verticals.title: Built for the operators opening new locations every quarter.

items.title: Cafes & F&B
items.body: From boutique brands opening their second branch to chains scaling past twelve.

items.title: Clinics & dental
items.body: Brand-consistent treatment rooms, reception, and patient-flow design.

items.title: Co-working
items.body: Members expect a recognizable feel across every floor and city.

items.title: Retail & boutique
items.body: Visual merchandising baked into the spec, every store opening.

items.title: Boutique hospitality
items.body: Maintain brand soul across rooms, lobbies, and dining.

items.title: Salons & wellness
items.body: From single-suite salons to multi-floor wellness centers.

steps.title: Upload your brand profile
steps.body: Logo, palette (≤6 colors with hex), type stack, materiality, voice, avoid-list, must-include list. Diwan locks the profile once you approve.

steps.title: List the locations
steps.body: Address, square meters, intended program (kitchen, seating, treatment, retail, etc.), and any per-location flex (intimate vs flagship).

steps.title: Diwan generates the design
steps.body: AI generates location-specific designs filtered through your locked brand. Diwan designers human-review before delivery.

steps.title: Synchronized installs
steps.body: Multi-location project management. Quarterly performance review. Brand drift dashboard tracks consistency across locations over time.

drift.title: We monitor brand consistency across every location.
drift.lede: Once you have multiple locations, drift creeps in: fabric substitutions, paint variants, signage tweaks. Our dashboard tracks compliance to your brand profile on every refresh, every replacement, every new branch — so the brand survives growth.

metrics.label: Average drift score per location (0 = perfect)

apply.title: Have a brand and a growth plan? Let's design it.
apply.lede: Initial consultation is free. We work with brands opening one or twelve locations.

hero.title: Diwan's curated mood pool, refreshed weekly.
hero.lede: Each customer's three concepts are sampled from this library. New references added weekly by Diwan's design team — drawn from Saudi photographers, Dezeen, AD Middle East, Pinterest, and our own commissioned photography. Tagged across five axes.

grid.title: Reference grid
grid.subtitle: Each entry is tagged across style, palette, density, formality, and regional voice — the same five axes the AI samples from.
